name: Lever Horizontal Leg Press
shortDescription: A horizontal plate-loaded machine exercise targeting the entire thigh, especially the quadriceps.
instructions: Sit on the leg press machine with your feet hip-width apart on the platform. Press the platform away by extending your legs, but avoid locking your knees, then lower slowly back to the starting position.
steps: Sit on the leg press and adjust seat as needed.
Place feet shoulder-width apart on platform.
Push platform away by extending legs.
Do not lock knees at the top position.
Lower platform under control to start position.
formCues: Keep lower back pressed into seat
breathing: Exhale as you press up, inhale as you lower down.
